title: cupania seemannii
intro: Cupania seemannii, also known as the Cupania tree or Sama tree, is a plant species in the family Sapindaceae, native to the Philippines. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. It is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and aiding in digestion. Cupania seemannii can be prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, and its extracts can be used in topical applications or as a dietary supplement.
